items.title: Police identify suspect in Rhode Island ice rink shooting
items.description: Two people were killed and three others were injured at a shooting at a high school hockey game in Pawtucket.

items.title: US soldiers arrive in Nigeria to aid its fight against Islamist militants
items.description: The troops, who landed at an airfield in Bauchi state, will not take part in combat operations, officials say.

items.title: The man whose bad break-up gave Madonna her breakthrough hit Like A Virgin
items.description: Billy Steinberg, who has died at the age of 75, co-wrote Madonna's 1984 chart-topper Like a Virgin.

items.title: Nuclear talks between US and Iran end in Geneva
items.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araqchi said the two countries had reached an understanding on the main "guiding principles", but work still needs to be...

items.title: France releases suspected Russian 'shadow fleet' tanker after fine paid
items.description: French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot said the vessel was departing Marseille after a payment of "several million euros".
